description_long: This pizzeria is housed in a rustic stone building with a terracotta-tiled roof, exuding a Mediterranean or classic Italian village charm. The exterior walls are constructed from light-colored stone, and the roof features weathered, orange-brown tiles. A cozy outdoor dining area is set up with wooden tables and chairs, and a red scooter is parked nearby, adding to the authentic Italian ambiance. Lush green vines climb the walls, and there are visible power lines and wooden utility poles adjacent to the building. The entrance is marked by a large arched doorway, and the cobblestone pavement enhances the old-world feel of the setting.
description: A rustic stone pizzeria with a terracotta-tiled roof, outdoor seating, and Mediterranean charm, featuring vines, a red scooter, and cobblestone pavement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched entrance, stone facade, and tiled roof, with utility poles and wires visible above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long stone wall, tiled roof, and some greenery climbing the building.
description_view_2: Rear angled view revealing the outdoor seating area, red scooter, and lush vines on the wall.
description_view_3: Side/rear view focusing on the outdoor dining setup, tables, chairs, and the building's secondary entrance.
